root_text.an6.82:1.1: “Chahi, bhikkhave, dhammehi samannāgato yathābhataṁ nikkhitto evaṁ niraye.
root_text.an6.82:1.3: Pāṇātipātī hoti, adinnādāyī hoti, kāmesumicchācārī hoti, musāvādī hoti, luddho ca, pagabbho ca.
root_text.an6.82:1.4: Imehi kho, bhikkhave, chahi dhammehi samannāgato yathābhataṁ nikkhitto evaṁ niraye.
root_text.an6.82:2.1: Chahi, bhikkhave, dhammehi samannāgato yathābhataṁ nikkhitto evaṁ sagge.
root_text.an6.82:2.3: Pāṇātipātā paṭivirato hoti, adinnādānā paṭivirato hoti, kāmesumicchācārā paṭivirato hoti, musāvādā paṭivirato hoti, aluddho ca, appagabbho ca.
root_text.an6.82:2.4: Imehi kho, bhikkhave, chahi dhammehi samannāgato yathābhataṁ nikkhitto evaṁ sagge”ti.

translation_text.an6.82:1.1: “Mendicants, someone with six qualities is placed in hell as if delivered there.
translation_text.an6.82:1.3: They kill living creatures, steal, commit sexual misconduct, and lie. And they’re greedy and rude.
translation_text.an6.82:1.4: Someone with these six qualities is placed in hell as if delivered there.
translation_text.an6.82:2.1: Someone with six qualities is placed in heaven as if delivered there.
translation_text.an6.82:2.3: They don’t kill living creatures, steal, commit sexual misconduct, or lie. And they’re not greedy or rude.
translation_text.an6.82:2.4: Someone with these six qualities is placed in heaven as if delivered there.”

variant_text.an6.82:1.3: Pāṇātipātī hoti, adinnādāyī hoti, kāmesumicchācārī hoti, musāvādī hoti → musāvādī hoti, pisuṇavāco hoti, pharusavāco hoti, samphappalāpī hoti, (si, sya-all, pts1ed) evaṁ
